title: PS Sn@p! Album

body:
PS I Love You || copyright Two Peas In A Bucket
The cover started off playing on the initials of Palm Springs. Originally it was just going to be an album for our Thanksgiving weekend. As I filled up some of the pages with bits from our trip, I realized I could use the dividers that come in the album to section this off and easily add in other pages. Excited to work in a smaller format and to utilize all the divided page protectors, which makes the assembling process fly by. Simple, colorful and fun. Just my style.

Because I didn't take all that many photos, I used a lot of ephemera, which I am digging. For some of the pieces that didn't fit directly onto the pages or into the pockets, I simply punched the holes and put them directly into the binder. To see all the pages go here.

PS- The Hey There stamp set that was sold out has been restocked.
